'''Feduch Importers''' was a shipping company with a branch in the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Algarine]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Algara II]]. The [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] believed the company to be a front for [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] and [[Slavery/Legends|slaving]] operations.
